summary: iOS | 5.0.1 | Free20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Home Screen after pairing Free20 with mobile and fresh installing production app from App Store
description_clean: Headset image missing from Home Screen after pairing Free20 with mobile and fresh installing production app from App Store.
steps: Pair Free20 headset with mobile device.
Fresh install the production app from the App Store.
Open the app and navigate to the Home Screen.
Observe the headset image on the Home Screen.
expected: Headset image should be displayed on the Home Screen after pairing and fresh installing the app.
actual: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen.
